payload.title: trust new — scaffold a strict project in one command
payload.description: CLI affordance the skills lean on: `trust new <name>` (and/or `cargo trust new`) emits cargo-new output plus the metadata key, a hello that exercises named args, and a README pointer. Removes the last 'paste these two lines' step from agent flows — scaffolding is where agents most reliably fumble manifest edits. Acceptance: `trust new demo && cd demo && cargo trust run` green with zero manual edits.
